summary: Microorganisms in dental plaque release adhesive substances such as lipoproteins which attach it firmly to tooth surfaces; this is crucial for understanding how and why plaque forms there. To directly address adherence mechanisms, focusing specifically on microbial secretions provides insight into the process. Answer: \boxed{D}. Summary highlighting critical aspects includes mentioning specific molecules produced by microbes contributing significantly to attachment properties while emphasizing relevance towards answering 'why' plaque sticks.
